zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Wenne於1468年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可布拉登哈姆時，她的父親Thomas Wenne23歲，母親Margaret Godslave19歲。她於大約1489年與John Flegg在英國英格蘭諾福爾可布拉登哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1525年之後在英國英格蘭諾福爾可希達哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Wenne于1468年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可布拉登哈姆时，她的父亲Thomas Wenne23岁，母亲Margaret Godslave19岁。她于大约1489年与John Flegg在英国英格兰諾福爾可布拉登哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1525年之后在英国英格兰諾福爾可希達哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Wenne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German (Hesse): from a pet form of   Hans  .
German: nickname or metonymic occupational name for a poultry keeper from Middle High German henne ‘hen, chicken’.
German: from a pet form of the personal name   Heinrich  .

variants.name: Henner
meanings: English: habitational name from Hennor (Herefordshire) or Heanor (Derbyshire), from Old English hēan, dative form of hēah ‘high’, + ofer ‘ridge, hill’.
German: patronymic from   Henne   1 and 3 or a variant of   Henne   2.
German: habitational for someone name from Henne in Saxony or Hennen in Westphalia.

variants.name: Hennemann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erhard, Erna, Guenter, Kurt, Otto.
German: elaborated form of the personal name   Henne   1.

variants.name: Hennen
meanings: German and Dutch: patronymic from the personal name Henne , a pet form of Heinrich (Dutch Hendrik) or Hans .

variants.name: Henny
meanings: German: variant of Henni, a cognate of Henne . In North America, this surname is also an altered form of another cognate Hennig .
Dutch: altered form of Swiss German Hänni (see Hanni ).

variants.name: Hans
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ananta, Bhim, Chander, Gopal, Madhur, Malkit, Nirmal, Preet, Puneet, Ravi, Rohit, Roop.  German Erwin, Guenther, Helmut, Gerhard, Hermann, Klaus, Kurt, Manfred, Merwin.

German and Dutch: from the personal name Hans, a shortened form of Johannes (see John ). This surname is also found in France (Vosges, Alsace, Lorraine, and Nord). It is also borne by Ashkenazic Jews, presumably as an adoption of the German or Dutch surname.
Indian (Punjab): Arora and Sikh name, from Sanskrit hamsa ‘swan’ or ‘goose’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Wenne was born in 1468, in Bradenham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Wenne, was 23 and her mother, Margaret Godslave, was 19. She married John Flegg about 1489, in Bradenham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1525, in Shipdham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Wenne est née en 1468, à Bradenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Wenne, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret Godslave, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John Flegg environ 1489, à Bradenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1525, à Shipdham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Wenne 1468 in Bradenham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Wenne 23 und ihre Mutter Margaret Godslave 19. Sie hat um 1489 in Bradenham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom John Flegg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1525 in Shipdham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Wenne è nata il nel 1468 nel Bradenham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Wenne, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Margaret Godslave, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato John Flegg circa 1489, nel Bradenham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1525, nel Shipdham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Wenneが1468年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクブラデンハムで生まれた時，父Thomas Wenneは23歳，母Margaret Godslaveは19歳であった。約1489年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクブラデンハムでJohn Fleggと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1525年以後にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクシュイプドハムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Wenne(이)가 1468년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 브라데함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Wenne(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Godslave(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1489년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 브라데함에서 John Flegg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1525년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 시p드함에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Wenne nasceu em 1468, em Bradenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Wenne, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Godslave, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com John Flegg aproximadamente 1489, em Bradenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1525, em Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Wenne родилась в 1468 г. в местности браденам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Wenne было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Godslave, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Flegg около 1489 г. в местности браденам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1525 г. в местности шипдхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Wenne nació en 1468, en Bradenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Wenne, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margaret Godslave, tenía 19 años. Se casó con John Flegg aproximadamente 1489, en Bradenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1525, en Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
